source: NDMA / NDRF / SDRF / PMFBY public eligibility rules

schemes.name: State Disaster Response Fund — House Damage Relief
schemes.eligibility: Pucca house fully damaged or kutcha house damaged/destroyed due to flood or cyclone. Owner must have lived in the house. Applicable across all states.
schemes.application_process: Submit to Block Development Officer (BDO) or District Collector office within 90 days of disaster declaration.
schemes.contact: District Collector office / State Revenue Department

schemes.name: SDRF Cattle/Livestock Loss
schemes.eligibility: Cattle (milch animals, draught animals, poultry) lost due to flood. Small and marginal farmers and agricultural labourers.
required_documents: Veterinary officer death certificate for the animal
Ear tag number or cattle registration
schemes.application_process: Submit to Tehsil office or Panchayat office within 60 days of loss.

schemes.name: SDRF Agricultural Input Subsidy (Crop Loss)
schemes.eligibility: Farmers with 33% or more crop loss due to natural calamity. Must be reported through the Tehsildar.
required_documents: Crop loss assessment by Revenue/Agriculture officer
schemes.application_process: Apply through the Tehsil or online on state agriculture portal within 30 days of crop damage.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
schemes.eligibility: Enrolled farmers (compulsory for loanee farmers, voluntary for others) whose insured crop was damaged by flood, drought, pest attack, or unseasonal rain.
schemes.application_process: Notify loss within 72 hours to insurance company or through the PMFBY app / Common Service Centre. Claims settled through crop cutting experiments and satellite data.
schemes.contact: Empanelled insurance company / Nearest CSC / PMFBY helpline 1800-180-1111

schemes.name: NDRF Immediate Gratuitous Relief
schemes.eligibility: All affected families in officially declared disaster areas. No income limit. Provided during rescue and relief phase.
required_documents: Aadhaar card (preferred but not mandatory during emergency)
schemes.application_process: Report to nearest relief camp operated by district administration, NDRF, or State Disaster Response Force.
schemes.contact: NDRF Helpline: 011-24363260 / State Emergency Operations Centre

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awaas Yojana — Gramin (Flood Damage)
schemes.eligibility: BPL/PMAY-listed beneficiaries whose house was fully damaged. Also available to those whose house was damaged beyond repair (category SC/ST/OBC/minorities/physically challenged prioritised).
schemes.application_process: Apply through Gram Panchayat / Block Development Officer. House should be constructed within 12 months.

schemes.name: SDRF Fishermen — Boat and Net Loss
schemes.eligibility: Fishermen who lost boats, nets, or fishing equipment due to cyclone or flood. Must hold valid fishing licence.
required_documents: Revenue officer or Fisheries Department loss certificate
schemes.application_process: Submit to District Fisheries Officer within 60 days of loss.

schemes.name: SDRF Ex-Gratia — Death in Flood
schemes.eligibility: Legal heir of person who died due to flood/drowning. No income limit.
required_documents: Aadhaar card of deceased and claimant
schemes.application_process: File claim at Tehsil office or District Collector office. Processed within 15 days of declaration.
